info.name: Microsoft Azure Visual Studio Resource Provider Client
info.description: Use these APIs to manage Visual Studio Team Services resources through the Azure Resource Manager. All task operations conform to the HTTP/1.1 protocol specification and each operation returns an x-ms-request-id header that can be used to obtain information about the request. You must make sure that requests made to these resources are secure. For more information, see https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/index.

request.description: Gets the details of all operations possible on the Microsoft.VisualStudio resource provider.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the possible operations on the Microsoft.VisualStudio resource provider.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.

request.description: Checks if the specified Visual Studio Team Services account name is available. Resource name can be either an account name or an account name and PUID.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the result of the name availability check.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) The name of the Visual Studio Team Services account resource.
(Required) The name of the extension.

request.description: Registers the extension with a Visual Studio Team Services account.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The extension resource was created for the specified account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) The name of the Visual Studio Team Services account resource.
(Required) The name of the extension.

request.description: Removes an extension resource registration for a Visual Studio Team Services account.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The extension resource has been deleted for the specified account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) The name of the Visual Studio Team Services account resource.
(Required) The name of the extension.

request.description: Gets the details of an extension associated with a Visual Studio Team Services account resource.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the extension resource details for the specified account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The specified extension has no plans defined.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) The name of the Visual Studio Team Services account resource.
(Required) The name of the extension.

request.description: Updates an existing extension registration for the Visual Studio Team Services account.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The extension resource was updated for the specified account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) The name of the Visual Studio Team Services account resource.

request.description: Gets the details of the extension resources created within the resource group.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains all extension resource details for the specified account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) Name of the resource.

request.description: Creates or updates a Visual Studio Team Services account resource.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The Visual Studio Team Services account resource was created or updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The Visual Studio Team Services account does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) Name of the resource.

request.description: Deletes a Visual Studio Team Services account resource.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The Visual Studio Team Services account resource was deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) Name of the resource.

request.description: Gets the Visual Studio Team Services account resource details.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the details of the Visual Studio Team Services account resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The Visual Studio Team Services account does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) Name of the resource.

request.description: Updates tags for Visual Studio Team Services account resource.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The Visual Studio Team Services account resource was updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The Visual Studio Team Services account does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.

request.description: Gets all Visual Studio Team Services account resources under the resource group linked to the specified Azure subscription.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the details of the Visual Studio Team Services account resources linked to the Azure subscription.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The operation type. The only supported value is 'put'.

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) Name of the Team Services account.
(Required) Name of the Team Services project.
(Required) This parameter should be set to the resourceName.

request.description: Gets the status of the project resource creation job.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the details of the newly created team project resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The operation type. The only supported value is 'put'.

response.name: The team project creation job is still running.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The operation type. The only supported value is 'put'.
This parameter is ignored and should be set to an empty string.

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) Name of the Team Services account.
(Required) Name of the Team Services project.

request.description: Creates a Team Services project in the collection with the specified name. 'VersionControlOption' and 'ProcessTemplateId' must be specified in the resource properties. Valid values for VersionControlOption: Git, Tfvc. Valid values for ProcessTemplateId: 6B724908-EF14-45CF-84F8-768B5384DA45, ADCC42AB-9882-485E-A3ED-7678F01F66BC, 27450541-8E31-4150-9947-DC59F998FC01 (these IDs correspond to Scrum, Agile, and CMMI process templates).

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the details of the created or updated team project resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: This parameter is ignored and should be set to an empty string.

response.name: The operation succeeded. A job to create the team project resource has been queued. The URI to monitor the status of the job is provided in the 'location' header.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: This parameter is ignored and should be set to an empty string.

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) Name of the Team Services account.
(Required) Name of the Team Services project.

request.description: Gets the details of a Team Services project resource.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the details of the updated team project resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The project or Azure subscription was not found.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) Name of the Team Services account.
(Required) Name of the Team Services project.

request.description: Updates the tags of the specified Team Services project.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the details of the updated team project resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription identifier.
(Required) Name of the resource group within the Azure subscription.
(Required) Name of the Team Services account.

request.description: Gets all Visual Studio Team Services project resources created in the specified Team Services account.

response.name: The operation succeeded. The response contains the details of the Visual Studio Team Services project resources created in the specified Team Services account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
